speaker: speaker1
text: We have the orientation this afternoon .

speaker: speaker2
text: What ’ s going to be covered in the orientation ?

speaker: speaker1
text: The company introduction , our mission , vision , various policies , insurances , pension plan , company ID , batch , telephone , e-mail set-up and training .

speaker: speaker2
text: Quite a lot . All them one afternoon ?

speaker: speaker2
text: It is OK with me . I enjoy being busy and learning new things .
